title: H2APEX Acquires HH2E Werk Lubmin, Expands Green Hydrogen Plans at Key German Hub
content: APEX Nova Holding GmbH, a 100% subsidiary of H2APEX Group SCA (â€œH2APEXâ€; ISIN: LU0472835155), has become the sole owner of all shares in HH2E Werk Lubmin GmbH (â€œHH2Eâ€) following the completion of the insolvency plan proceedings. This means that, in addition to its own project, which has been in place since 2023, H2APEX now has another strategically important project to produce green hydrogen at Germanyâ€™s most attractive hydrogen location in Lubmin. The acquired land already has a grid connection from the company 50Hertz as well as a water supply, and will also offer the possibility of feeding hydrogen into the planned hydrogen transmission network in the future. These connections to the electricity and water supply are very important for the execution and commissioning of a successful hydrogen project.
author: Analysts Account
